indicators.name: seating arrangement
indicators.rationale: Rows of chairs facing a podium suggest a lecture or presentation setup rather than individual workstations.

indicators.name: lack of flat work surfaces
indicators.rationale: No tables or desks are visible, making it impossible to set up a computer workstation.

indicators.name: high-traffic area
indicators.rationale: The room is designed for large gatherings, not individual work, indicating high foot traffic and potential distractions.

indicators.name: podium and microphone
indicators.rationale: Podium and microphone suggest a speaker or presenter role, not individual work.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is marginally adequate for computer work (Solo). The rows of chairs facing a podium suggest a lecture or presentation setup, and the lack of flat work surfaces makes it impossible to set up a computer workstation. The high-traffic area and the presence of a podium and microphone further indicate that this space is designed for large gatherings, not individual work.
